texto: Any activity where you let go of fears and doubts and inertia, and move toward a goal you desire brings, if not the goal itself (which may or may not be available to you) but brings you a life full of adventure, dedication, excitement and fulfillment – in other words – satisfaction and happiness.
explicacao: Citação de Martin Gover sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Any activity where you let go of fears and doubts and inertia, and move toward a goal you desire …” articula felicidade, goal-setting, goals em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como goals e vida.

frase_original: Any activity where you let go of fears and doubts and inertia, and move toward a goal you desire brings, if not the goal itself (which may or may not be available to you) but brings you a life full of adventure, dedication, excitement and fulfillment – in other words – satisfaction and happiness.
